name: Eggnog Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve gelatin in brandy; set aside.
2. Scald milk in the top of a double boiler.
3. Beat egg yolks and 1/4 cup sugar at medium speed.
4. Gradually stir about 1/4 of hot milk into yolk mixture; add to remaining hot milk, stirring constantly.
5. Cook over simmering water, stirring until thick, about 3 to 5 minutes. Remove from heat, stir in softened gelatin, bourbon, vanilla, and 1/4 teaspoon nutmeg.
6. Chill, stirring occasionally until the mixture mounds when dropped from a spoon.
7. Beat egg whites and salt until foamy; add 3 tablespoons sugar and beat until stiff.
8. Fold into custard.
9. Beat 1/2 cup whipping cream until soft peaks form; fold into custard.
10. Pour filling into prepared crust; chill 3 hours or until set.
11. Beat remaining 1/2 cup whipping cream until foamy; add 1 tablespoon powdered sugar and beat until soft peaks form.
12. Garnish pie with whipped cream and sprinkle with nutmeg.
